ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. The Court shall notify the State Bar of all the sanction orders as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3). NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
